mapper.insert:
insert into purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply (purchase_plan_entry_id, dep_purchase_apply_entry_id, dep_purchase_apply_id, purchase_bill_no, purchase_plan_id, plan_no, del_flag, tenant_id, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.purchasePlanEntryId}, #{item.depPurchaseApplyEntryId}, #{item.depPurchaseApplyId}, #{item.purchaseBillNo}, #{item.purchasePlanId}, #{item.planNo}, '0', #{item.tenantId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.update: update purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r inner join purchase_plan_entry e on r.purchase_plan_entry_id = e.id and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} set r.del_flag = '1', r.delete_by = #{deleteBy}, r.delete_time = now(), r.update_time = now() where e.parent_id = #{planId} and r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null)
mapper.select: select dpa.purchase_bill_no as applyBillNo, d.name as departmentName, e.qty as qty, coalesce(cu.nick_name, cu.user_name) as createByName, dpa.create_time as createTime, coalesce(au.nick_name, au.user_name) as auditByName, dpa.update_time as auditTime from purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r inner join dep_purchase_apply_entry e on r.dep_purchase_apply_entry_id = e.id and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (e.del_flag is null or e.del_flag != 1) inner join dep_purchase_apply dpa on e.parent_id = dpa.id and dpa.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (dpa.del_flag = 0 or dpa.del_flag is null) left join fd_department d on dpa.department_id = d.id left join sys_user cu on dpa.create_by = cu.user_id left join sys_user au on dpa.update_by = au.user_id where r.purchase_plan_entry_id = #{entryId} and r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null) order by dpa.purchase_bill_no, e.id

select distinct coalesce(nullif(trim(r.purchase_bill_no), ''), dpa.purchase_bill_no) as purchase_bill_no from purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r inner join purchase_plan_entry e on r.purchase_plan_entry_id = e.id and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} left join dep_purchase_apply_entry e2 on r.dep_purchase_apply_entry_id = e2.id and e2.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (e2.del_flag is null or e2.del_flag != 1) left join dep_purchase_apply dpa on e2.parent_id = dpa.id and dpa.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (dpa.del_flag = 0 or dpa.del_flag is null) where e.parent_id = #{planId} and r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null) having purchase_bill_no is not null and purchase_bill_no != '' order by purchase_bill_no

select distinct dpa.purchase_bill_no as applyBillNo, w.name as warehouseName, coalesce(cu.nick_name, cu.user_name) as createByName, dpa.create_time as createTime, coalesce(cu.nick_name, cu.user_name) as submitByName, dpa.create_time as submitTime, coalesce(uu.nick_name, uu.user_name) as auditByName, dpa.update_time as auditTime from purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r inner join purchase_plan_entry e on r.purchase_plan_entry_id = e.id and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} inner join dep_purchase_apply_entry e2 on r.dep_purchase_apply_entry_id = e2.id and e2.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (e2.del_flag is null or e2.del_flag != 1) inner join dep_purchase_apply dpa on e2.parent_id = dpa.id and dpa.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (dpa.del_flag = 0 or dpa.del_flag is null) left join fd_warehouse w on dpa.warehouse_id = w.id left join sys_user cu on dpa.create_by = cu.user_id left join sys_user uu on dpa.update_by = uu.user_id where e.parent_id = #{planId} and r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null) and dpa.purchase_bill_no is not null and trim(dpa.purchase_bill_no) != '' order by dpa.purchase_bill_no

select r.purchase_plan_entry_id as entryId, r.purchase_bill_no as purchaseBillNo from purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r inner join purchase_plan_entry e on r.purchase_plan_entry_id = e.id and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} where e.parent_id = #{planId} and r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null) and r.purchase_bill_no is not null order by r.purchase_plan_entry_id, r.purchase_bill_no

select r.dep_purchase_apply_entry_id from purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r where r.purchase_plan_entry_id = #{entryId} and r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null) order by r.id

select r.purchase_plan_entry_id as entryId, r.dep_purchase_apply_entry_id as depApplyEntryId from purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r inner join purchase_plan_entry e on r.purchase_plan_entry_id = e.id and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} where e.parent_id = #{planId} and r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null) order by r.purchase_plan_entry_id, r.id
